authenticationKey.title: authenticationKey
authenticationKey.description: Stores the authentication key that’s used to generate the verification code.

customerCode.title: customerCode
customerCode.description: Stores the user-provided verification code that's passed into the flow.

customerId.title: customerId
customerId.description: Stores the UserId or ContactID of the User

customerType.title: customerType
customerType.description: Stores the Id type whether it is User or Contact
